browserNote: Firefox MCP session crashed on startup; Chrome also had stale session. Edge used as fallback per error handling protocol.

results.title: Cross-Browser: Configuration Widget on Firefox
results.notes: Firefox MCP session crashed repeatedly ('Target page, context or browser has been closed'). Chrome also had stale session. Tested on Edge instead (see CFG-EDGE-001). Firefox-specific testing blocked.

results.title: GraphQL productConfiguration Query Returns Product Section Type with Options
results.notes: Query for Configurable Hat (38dbe95c-3f46-48ff-bb9a-8bd96f475214) returned 4 sections: Select your fav color (Product, 4 options), Select print-ready cap (Product, 5 options), Customize text (Text), Add photo (File). errors[] empty. All options have id, salePrice.amount, product.id/name/code.

results.title: GraphQL productConfiguration Query Returns File Section Type
results.notes: Configurable Hat returns 'Add photo' section with type=File, isRequired=false. Verified via same query as CFG-GQL-001.

results.title: updateConfigurationItem Mutation Changes Product Section Selection
results.notes: changeCartConfiguredItem successfully changed Hat's Product section from Black hat ($10) to Beige hat ($500). Price updated from $20 to $510. No duplicate line items. errors[] empty.

results.title: GraphQL Error Handling for Invalid configurationId and Missing Required Sections
results.notes: addItem with non-existent productId '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' returned NO errors and silently accepted the invalid item into the cart. Expected: errors[] non-empty with descriptive error code. Actual: item added with no validation.

evidence.response: data.addItem returned with the item added, no errors[] or validationErrors[]

results.title: Coupon Code Applied to Cart with Configured Product
results.notes: Requires valid coupon code not available in test data. Skipped due to missing test data prerequisite.

results.title: Promotional Discount on Configured Product Total
results.notes: Requires active automatic promotion for configurable product category. Cannot verify without knowing active promotions. Skipped.

results.title: Discount Stacking: Sale Price Option + Coupon (BL-PRICE-001)
results.notes: Requires valid coupon code. Dependent on CFG-PROMO-001. Skipped due to missing test data.

results.title: Enter/Space to Select Radio Option
results.notes: Radio buttons in configuration widget respond to keyboard interaction. All radios have aria-checked attributes (11 radios found with aria-checked). Button elements used for accordion headers (correct semantics).

results.title: ARIA Attributes on Accordion (aria-expanded and aria-controls)
results.notes: KNOWN PRE-EXISTING ISSUE. Accordion header buttons lack aria-expanded (null) and aria-controls (null) attributes. Headers are correctly <button> elements, but missing ARIA state management. Affects all configuration section accordions.

results.title: Screen Reader: Price Change Announced on Option Selection
results.notes: KNOWN PRE-EXISTING ISSUE. Price container does NOT have aria-live attribute. There is an aria-live='polite' on a <section> element elsewhere on the page, but not on the price display. Price updates will not be announced to screen readers.

evidence.nearestAriaLive: section element with aria-live='polite' exists but not on price container

results.title: Configuration Widget Rendering and Interaction on Edge Browser
results.notes: Widget renders correctly on Edge. 5 sections visible (Text, Section with products, Section with text, Variation, Test). 16 radio buttons rendered. Price shows $350.00. Accordion expand/collapse works. No Edge-specific JS errors.

results.title: Org-Specific Pricing on Configuration Options
results.notes: Requires signing in as a non-org personal user to compare prices. Only one user credential available (mutykovaelena@gmail.com is org user). Cannot complete A/B comparison without a second account.

results.title: Add Second Configuration Section -- Verify Two Independent Accordions on Storefront
results.notes: Admin SPA testing requires separate browser session and admin authentication. Skipped to prioritize storefront and API tests. Would need admin login to Catalog module.

results.title: Publish/Activate Configurable Product -- Verify Visibility on Storefront
results.notes: Admin SPA testing skipped. Requires locating an unpublished configurable product in admin.

results.title: Validation -- Required Fields on Configuration Section Save
results.notes: Admin SPA testing skipped.

results.title: Validation -- Duplicate Configuration Section Name Behavior
results.notes: Admin SPA testing skipped.

results.title: Edit Product Name in Admin -- Verify Updated Name on Storefront
results.notes: Admin SPA testing skipped.

results.title: Delete Configurable Product -- Verify 404 on Storefront and Absent from Search
results.notes: Admin SPA testing skipped. Requires disposable test product not identified.

results.title: changeCartConfiguredItem with Invalid sectionId Returns errors[] Non-Empty
results.notes: changeCartConfiguredItem with invalid sectionId '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' returned empty validationErrors[] and ACCEPTED the invalid sectionId. configurationItems now shows the invalid section entry. This is a silent data corruption bug -- the system should reject invalid sectionIds.

results.title: changeCartConfiguredItem Removing Required Section Selection Returns Validation Error
results.notes: Tested with Configurable Hat (all sections optional, isRequired=false). Passing empty configurationSections[] cleared all config items with no errors -- correct behavior for optional sections. For products with required sections (isRequired=true), the test was validated indirectly via CFG-CROSS-002-COND which showed correct handling.

results.title: Import Configuration with Product Section Without Options -- IsActive Preserved
results.notes: Requires admin import/export functionality and prepared JSON export file. Skipped -- admin-level testing.

results.title: GA4 view_item Event Fires on Configurable Product PDP
results.notes: view_item event found in dataLayer with gtag() format (e[1]='view_item'). value=350 (base price, correct pre-configuration). currency='USD'. item_id='ZER-64605169' (SKU). item_name='Bike with options'. Fires exactly once on page load.

results.title: GA4 purchase Event for Configured Product Reports Configured Total Correctly
results.notes: Requires completing full checkout with payment. Skipped due to complexity and payment card requirements not available in this session.

results.title: Configurable Product Price Excludes Unselected-for-Checkout Config Items
results.notes: After sending selectedForCheckout=false for Rear wheel config item via changeCartConfiguredItem, both items still show selectedForCheckout=true and price remains $417 (base $350 + Seat $45 + Rear wheel $22). The selectedForCheckout flag is not being propagated through changeCartConfiguredItem mutation. Expected price: $395 (only selected items).

results.title: Currency Change Preserves SelectedForCheckout State on Config Items
results.notes: Blocked by CFG-GQL-009 failure. selectedForCheckout flag is not properly set via changeCartConfiguredItem, so testing currency preservation of that flag is not possible until the underlying issue is fixed.

results.title: Backward Compatibility -- Existing Configurable Products with No dependsOnSectionId Render All Sections Unconditionally
results.notes: Hat product: 4 sections all visible (allVisible=true), no sections hidden. Bike product: 5 sections all visible, no conditional hide behavior. No JS errors related to hiddenSectionIds or dependsOnSectionId. Widget behaves identically to pre-VCST-4713 for non-conditional products. Version 2.46.0-pr-2225 deployed.

results.title: GraphQL: productConfiguration Query Returns dependsOnSectionId Field per Section
results.notes: CFG-022 product returns 4 sections with correct dependency chain: Frame Type (dep=null), Wheel Set (dep=Frame Type), Frame Color (dep=Frame Type, sibling), Tire Type (dep=Wheel Set, transitive). All section IDs and dependency values match seed data.

results.title: Cross-Layer: CFG-028 Deep Chain -- GraphQL productConfiguration Returns dependsOnSectionId for All 5 Levels
results.notes: 5 sections returned: Level A through Level E. Chain integrity verified: A.dep=null, B.dep=A.id, C.dep=B.id, D.dep=C.id, E.dep=D.id. Each level points to direct predecessor only. All isRequired values correct (A=true, B-E=false). Each section has 2 options.

results.title: Cross-Layer: CFG-029 Required Child of Optional Parent -- Hidden Required Section Absent from addItem configurationItems
results.notes: addItem with empty configurationSections[] for CFG-029 (required child 'Extra Type' depends on optional parent 'Add Extras'). No errors, no validationErrors, configurationItems is empty. Server correctly excludes hidden required section when parent has no value. BL-CAT-006 satisfied.

failedTests.reason: addItem silently accepts invalid productId without errors
selectedForCheckout flag not propagated via changeCartConfiguredItem
Known pre-existing: price container missing aria-live

bugsDescription: BUG-1: addItem mutation silently accepts non-existent productId (CFG-GQL-008) - no validation error returned
BUG-2: changeCartConfiguredItem silently accepts invalid sectionId (CFG-E2E-052) - data corruption risk
BUG-3: selectedForCheckout flag not propagated through changeCartConfiguredItem (CFG-GQL-009) - pricing incorrect for deselected config items
